problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling may resolve Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
